top_signals.title: Yuan Gains as PBOC Sets Fix Below 6.8 for First Time Since 2023
top_signals.summary: The yuan advanced after China’s central bank signaled its comfort with the currency’s strength by setting the daily reference rate below 6.80 per dollar for the first time since 2023.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Iron Ore Set For Weekly Gain on BHP Port Strike, FMG Stalemate
top_signals.summary: Iron ore was on track for the biggest weekly gain since early May as a looming strike at BHP Group’s Port Hedland terminal stoked supply concerns, even as fundamentals remain tested.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Yen gains after finance minister urges pension funds to invest more at home
top_signals.summary: Finance Minister Satsuki Katayama's remarks sent Japan's currency to a fresh high for the day, while bonds rallied and equities extended their gains.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Central-bank repricing affecting yields, FX, liquidity and equities.
